customer_anxiety_profile: James is cooperative and not anxious about solar itself. His friction points are logistical, not skeptical. He is currently managing a funeral (Friday into Saturday) and coordinating with a daughter who works for Cook County Sheriff, gets off at 5PM, and does not live at his home. He will need the appointment reminder because he flagged his own uncertainty about Monday availability.
unresolved_concerns: James never asked why he was interested in solar — Holland did not ask, and no interest_in_solar anchor was established. The closer has no emotional thread to tie back to; they are starting the value conversation from scratch.

James's bill variance caveat ('that's not my regular price') was noted but not addressed — the closer has 12 months of kWh data from the verbal readback and should use that for sizing rather than relying on the single $200+ payment James mentioned.

James gave a soft conditional close: 'give me a call and I'll let you know if she's here or something.' The daughter's attendance is not confirmed — it is assumed. The closer or a confirmation call should verify the daughter will be present before the specialist travels.
sensitive_topics_raised: Wife's death — James put daughter on title after wife passed. He mentioned this matter-of-factly but it is recent enough to have shaped household structure. The closer should not treat the daughter as a 'co-signer' framing; she is a co-decision-maker on the title.
Funeral attendance Friday through Saturday — James is in a grief context this week. The closer should open with acknowledgment if the appointment is Monday and the funeral was recent.
exact_promises_rep_made: Text with appointment details will be sent after the call.
A specialist will 'come by' — framed as in-person visit, not a phone call. Manager should confirm which format this appointment actually is before the closer contacts James.
closer_should_know: James's daughter is on the title and is a required co-decision-maker — she does not live at the home and must travel there after a 5PM shift on a Monday. If she does not show, the closer cannot run the full proposal. Confirm her attendance before arrival.
